body:
## Rationale

**Nu-metal mainstream + melodic death metal diversity tier — highest-TAM pair in the remaining 12 uncovered drummers.**

- **John Otto** — Limp Bizkit (1994–present). Nu-metal pioneer. Songs: "Break Stuff", "Rollin'", "Nookie", "My Way". Massive mainstream TAM — Limp Bizkit sold 40M+ albums; nu-metal queries are high-volume ("limp bizkit drummer", "break stuff drum fill"). Funk/hip-hop influenced metal drumming = distinct technique content angle.
- **Jocke Wallgren** — Amon Amarth (2016–present). Melodic death/Viking metal, globally touring act. Songs: "Twilight of the Thunder God", "Runes to My Memory", "Fafner's Gold". Amon Amarth are a top-10 melodic death metal band by search volume.

Both confirmed in `extendedBios.js` (slugs: `john-otto`, `jocke-wallgren`). Both absent from `packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js`.

## Implementation

**Files to create:**
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/john-otto.js` — 3 licks
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/jocke-wallgren.js` — 3 licks

**Files to update:**
- `packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js` — add 2 imports + 2 spreads
- `api/sitemap.js` — add lick hub entries

**Lick ideas (verify YouTube IDs with --strict gate):**

John Otto:
- `john-otto-break-stuff-groove` — "Break Stuff" main groove - signature nu-metal feel
- `john-otto-rollin-groove` — "Rollin'" - angular hip-hop-influenced groove
- `john-otto-nookie-fill` — "Nookie" - signature fill + breakdown

Jocke Wallgren:
- `jocke-wallgren-twilight-double-bass` — "Twilight of the Thunder God" - double bass run
- `jocke-wallgren-runes-to-my-memory-groove` — "Runes to My Memory" - melodic groove
- `jocke-wallgren-fafners-gold-blast` — "Fafner's Gold" - blast beat section

## Quality gate
- ≥ 300 words per lick page
- ≥ 3 internal links per lick page (→ drummer profile, → hub, → related technique)
- HowTo + VideoObject + MusicRecording + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD
- YouTube IDs verified via --strict gate (#984 pattern)
- Hub pages: CollectionPage + ItemList schema

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves `john otto limp bizkit`, `amon amarth drummer`, `jocke wallgren drum kit` query buckets. Nu-metal cross-over (John Otto) expands genre coverage beyond extreme metal skew. Adds ~6 lick pages + 2 hub pages = 8 net-new indexable pages.

## Verify
1. `grep john-otto packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js` returns import + spread
2. `grep jocke-wallgren packages/frontend/data/licks/index.js` returns import + spread
3. `/drummers/john-otto/licks` and `/drummers/jocke-wallgren/licks` return 200
4. Each lick page has HowTo + VideoObject JSON-LD in SSR response
5. Both hub slugs appear in sitemap

## Done
- [ ] `john-otto.js` + `jocke-wallgren.js` created with 3 licks each
- [ ] index.js updated
- [ ] sitemap updated
- [ ] Hub pages render correctly
title: SEO batch: signature licks — John Otto (Limp Bizkit) + Jocke Wallgren (Amon Amarth) (~6 licks, 2 hubs)
